description: Style NoteThis force 10 shoe is a comfortable lifestyle shoe that performs well even when you're at the gym, taking a brisk walk or jogging in the morning. It's a great foot style option for the health conscious and the comfort junkies! Product DetailsBlunt toed casual shoe in white, turqoise and green with central lace-ups Synthetic leather upper Padded collar and tongue Lightweight rubber outsole with groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
